acids-bases.prompt: A single displacement reaction is represented below. PQ + R ----> PR + Q Which of the following is true about the reactants and products? P) AgNO3 + NaCl ---> AgCl + NaNO3 Q) Mg + 2 HCl ---> MgCl2 + H2 R) CH4 + 2 O2 ---> CO2 + 2 H2O S) 2 KOH + H2SO4 ---> K2SO4 + H2O
